sentences.text: It took him all day, and he was very tired, so he slept in his chair until morning.
Hans said, 'I will enjoy my garden,' and he started working.
But he could not care for his flowers, because the Miller always asked him to do jobs.
Hans was sad sometimes, because he thought his flowers felt forgotten, but he was happy to help his friend.
